issues.comment: Variable 'organization_context' is not defined but is accessed with 'organization_context.member.has_global_access', causing NameError. Should be 'organization.member.has_global_access' based on the method parameter.
Django QuerySet slicing 'queryset[start_offset:stop]' with negative start_offset is not supported and will raise an exception. Django ORM does not allow negative indexing in queryset slicing.
math.floor and math.ceil are used but math module is never imported, causing NameError at runtime.
organization_context variable is referenced but not defined in method scope - should likely be 'organization' instead, causing AttributeError.
Span count safety check (max_segment_spans) was completely removed without replacement, allowing unbounded segment growth that could cause memory exhaustion.
Negative offset slicing queryset[negative:positive] doesn't work as intended in Python - will return unexpected results rather than enabling 'reverse pagination from arbitrary positions'.
